description: Direct-to-consumer ad creative: Facebook/Instagram ads, Google ads, product copy

slots.hint: Campaign objective — awareness, conversion, retargeting, ROAS target?
What product are you advertising — name, key benefit, price point?
Target audience — demographics, interests, pain points?
Ad format — Facebook/Instagram feed, Stories, Google search, display?
Brand voice — playful, urgent, authoritative, empathetic?
Specific offer, discount, or urgency element?
Character limits, words to avoid, regulatory restrictions?
Which AI model will run this prompt?
